atomic_units.action: Send the 30-day feedback form to the new employee and the Hiring Manager.
Send a reminder for the 30-day feedback form.
atomic_units.condition: If either the new employee or the Hiring Manager has not submitted the form by Day 30

atomic_units.action: Conduct a 30-day check-in meeting with the employee.
Determine the appropriate next step based on the Hiring Manager's feedback.
atomic_units.condition: If the Hiring Manager's feedback indicates performance concerns

atomic_units.action: Mark the onboarding checklist as complete in the HRMS.
atomic_units.condition: If no performance concerns are raised

atomic_units.action: Archive all onboarding documents in the employee's digital file on the HR document management system.
Send a completion confirmation email to the Hiring Manager and the HR Manager.
